task_description: Conduct a compliance audit for the wholesale department. First, retrieve all active products specifically in the 'wholesale' category. Next, review the product descriptions to identify all supplier GST numbers. Finally, ensure that every extracted GST number is fully verified in our system.

prod_w1.name: Bulk Office Chairs
prod_w1.description: Ergonomic chairs for office spaces. Supplier GST: 27AADCB2230M1Z2.

prod_w3.name: Industrial Printer
prod_w3.description: Heavy duty laser printer. Supplier GST: 07BBAAM1234P1Z5.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: The agent must first gather the underlying data containing the target GST numbers to begin the audit.
expected_actions: Call list_products_by_category with category parameter set to 'wholesale'
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: A successful tool call retrieving the wholesale product list.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Demonstrates a tendency to seek order and prefer a structured approach to tasks by systematically auditing existing records before making external verification calls.
expected_actions: Call get_gst_verification_status for the extracted GST numbers to assess their current state
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Multiple calls to get_gst_verification_status corresponding to the deduplicated GST numbers found in the product descriptions.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Reflects the desire to keep things tidy by only executing the external verification simulation on numbers that actually lack verification, avoiding messy redundant operations.
expected_actions: Call verify_gst_number only on GST numbers that returned an unverified, expired, or missing status in the previous step
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Tool calls to verify_gst_number strictly limited to the subset of GST numbers needing an update (07BBAAM1234P1Z5 and 29CCZPP5678Q1Z8).

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: The agent must first gather the underlying data containing the target GST numbers to begin the audit.
expected_actions: Call list_products_by_category with category parameter set to 'wholesale'
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: A successful tool call retrieving the wholesale product list.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Demonstrates a tendency to work hard and a willingness to exert themselves by explicitly pushing every single GST number through the verification tool, guaranteeing compliance through sheer effort.
expected_actions: Directly call verify_gst_number on all GST numbers extracted from the product descriptions without checking prior status
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: A high volume of verify_gst_number tool calls matching the total number of GST instances found (including already verified ones like 27AADCB2230M1Z2), bypassing the read-only status check entirely.
